rationale: Both reviews identify exactly the same three real, diff-grounded api-design defects (tautological curvature theorem with unused hyp, IsCompactOrientedManifold.oriented : True, and banach_steinhaus wrapper) and prescribe the same fixes (remove or scope properly); Review 1's extra out-of-scope/roadmap claim is unconfirmable from the diff and would not produce a meaningfully different result.
